sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55956" key="ka/tqane" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάτθᾰνε</orth>, <sense id="n55956.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καταθνῄσκω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατθᾶξαι</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καταθήγω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατθάψαι</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καταθάπτω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατθέμεν</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάτθεμεν</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάτθετε</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάτθεσαν</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατθέμεθα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατθέσθην</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατθέμενοι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάτθεο</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κατατίθημι</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
